text: Medical image segmentation is a crucial part in clinical image processing. Thus, the comparison and assessment of the quality of the results are the key factor to promote the progress of the research. Researchers have encountered many difficult problems in the medical image processing in the process of achieving the goal, such as choosing appropriate evaluation standards, inconsistent mathematical expression in the evaluation standard in the published literature, and low efficiency of the calculation due to the large amount of data and so on. These problems can not be solved sufficiently by the present evaluation standards, and there is a lack of evaluation standards for fuzzy segmentation. Based on the above research, this paper analyzes the present status of the evaluation of medical image segmentation, explores its corresponding difficulties, and discusses the improvement method of new evaluation standards.
headline: Fully Human Written
